hero.title: Cuban Salsa in the heart of Paris
hero.subtitle: Somos Familia — a passionate community celebrating dance, music and togetherness through Cuban Salsa.

nights.title: Our regular nights
nights.subtitle: Three gatherings to dance, connect and share.

timbanight.name: Timbanight
timbanight.subtitle: The Timba & Cuban Salsa night
timbanight.description: Every Tuesday from 19 May at Colonel Fabien (Paris 10th) for salsa classes and a mix night 70% Cuban / 30% bachata. Enjoy a friendly atmosphere for only €5 all inclusive (class, evening & cloakroom) from 7 PM to 1 AM! 💃🔥

communale.name: La Communale Salsa Party
communale.subtitle: The Cuban Salsa night for everyone
communale.description: Discover the new season at La Communale (Saint-Ouen) with a salsa class by Ibra followed by a free latin mix night. A friendly evening blending dance, gastronomy and culture in the historic MAN hall for just €5 per class!

nochecubana.name: La Noche Cubana
nochecubana.subtitle: The month's big Cuban Salsa night
nochecubana.description: Join us every 2nd Saturday of the month at Jo&Joe Gentilly for the Noche Cubana — an explosive night with salsa classes and a Cuban mix. Enjoy a unique setting and a friendly atmosphere until 1:30 AM for just €12 all inclusive!
nochecubana.venue: Jo&Joe Gentilly, 89-93 Av. Paul Vaillant Couturier, 94250 Gentilly

quaisalsa.name: Quai en Salsa
quaisalsa.day: Every Sunday · 25 June – end of August
quaisalsa.subtitle: Cuban Salsa in the open air
quaisalsa.description: All summer long, join us on the banks of the Seine to dance outdoors at sunset. A festive and free event, feet by the water, celebrating the season with Cuban Salsa.

upcoming_events.title: Upcoming events
upcoming_events.subtitle: Don't miss any of our special nights

about_preview.title: Who are we?
about_preview.text: Somos Familia is an association dedicated to promoting Cuban Salsa and Afro-Latin cultures. Founded by enthusiasts, we welcome dancers of all levels in a spirit of family and sharing.

about.meta_description: Discover the history, values and team of the Somos Familia association, dedicated to Cuban Salsa in Paris.
about.hero_subtitle: An association built on passion, transmission and the sharing of Cuban culture.
about.history_p1: In 2018, two passionate individuals decided to transform their love of Cuban culture into something bigger than themselves. At first, it was just workshops, encounters, simple moments where music brought people together. Then, very quickly, the energy grew.
about.history_p2: The weekly nights at Sharky's became their playground: five years of making the dance floor vibrate, building connections, watching friendships, routines and rituals come to life. Five years where every Friday seemed to write a new chapter.
about.history_p3: Over time, the association opened up to new horizons: one-off events, regular gatherings, projects taking shape to the rhythm of drums, voices and smiles. But behind every night, every workshop, every dance, there is a deeper mission: to train young dancers, support them, help them grow, and above all pass on the richness of Cuban and Afro-Caribbean culture.
about.history_p4:
What makes this association strong is not just the dancing.
It's the spirit.
A spirit built on kindness, togetherness, and a true family of the heart.
A spirit so powerful that it gave the association its name: Somos Familia.
about.history_p5: And that name is no coincidence. It comes from a song — Somos Familia by Calle Real — which over the years has become the association's anthem. A melody that unites, that gathers, that reminds everyone why they are here: to share, to learn, to feel alive together.
about.history_p6:
Somos Familia is not just a name.
It's a promise.
A promise to dance together, grow together, and keep Cuban culture alive — with heart.
about.values_subtitle: Three pillars that guide everything we do.

community.title: Community
community.description: We are a family. Every member is welcomed warmly, regardless of their level or background.

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: Cuban Salsa is much more than a dance — it's a way of life that we share with enthusiasm.

authenticity.title: Authenticity
authenticity.description: We respect and transmit the cultural codes of Cuba, in all their richness and diversity.

events.meta_description: Timbanight on Tuesdays, La Communale on Thursdays — all Somos Familia events.
events.hero_subtitle: Two weekly gatherings and special events throughout the year.
events.exceptional_subtitle: Workshops, concerts and special nights not to be missed.

join.meta_description: Become a volunteer or member of the Somos Familia association.
join.hero_subtitle: Become a volunteer or member and be part of the Somos Familia adventure.
join.volunteer_description: Our association runs thanks to the energy and commitment of our volunteers. Whether you have 2 or 10 hours a week, there's a role made for you.
join.form_subtitle: Fill in this form and we'll get back to you quickly.
join.motivation_placeholder: Why do you want to join Somos Familia?
join.success: Thank you! Your application has been received. We'll be in touch very soon.
join.membership_description: By becoming a member, you directly support our activities and enjoy exclusive benefits throughout the season.
join.benefit_discount: Reduced price on nights and events
